compressed_prompt: Draft 7-day itineraries for India and China, tabulating them separately, with 6 asterisks ******* in between.
response:
Certainly! Here are the 7-day itineraries for India and China, tabulated separately with a divider in between.

***

### 7-Day Itinerary for India

| Day   | Activity/Destination                  | Description                                                                                     |
|-------|---------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Day 1 | Arrive in Delhi                       | Explore Old Delhi, visit Jama Masjid, and enjoy street food in Chandni Chowk.                    |
| Day 2 | Agra                                  | Take a day trip to Agra to visit the Taj Mahal and Agra Fort.                                   |
| Day 3 | Jaipur                                | Travel to Jaipur, visit Amber Fort, City Palace, and Hawa Mahal.                                |
| Day 4 | Jaipur                                | Explore Jaipur further, visit Jantar Mantar, and shop at local markets.                         |
| Day 5 | Udaipur                               | Travel to Udaipur, visit City Palace, and take a boat ride on Lake Pichola.                     |
| Day 6 | Jodhpur                               | Travel to Jodhpur, visit Mehrangarh Fort and explore the Blue City.                             |
| Day 7 | Return to Delhi                       | Travel back to Delhi for departure or further exploration.                                      |

***

### 7-Day Itinerary for China

| Day   | Activity/Destination                  | Description                                                                                     |
|-------|---------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Day 1 | Arrive in Beijing                     | Visit Tiananmen Square and explore the Forbidden City.                                          |
| Day 2 | Great Wall of China                   | Take a day trip to visit different sections of the Great Wall.                                  |
| Day 3 | Beijing                                | Visit the Summer Palace and the Temple of Heaven.                                               |
| Day 4 | Xi'an                                 | Travel to Xi'an, visit the Terracotta Warriors and Horses.                                      |
| Day 5 | Xi'an                                 | Explore the Muslim Quarter, the Wild Goose Pagoda, and the City Wall.                           |
| Day 6 | Shanghai                              | Travel to Shanghai, visit The Bund and Yu Garden.                                               |
| Day 7 | Shanghai                              | Explore Shanghai further, visit Tianzifang, and shop on Nanjing Road.                           |
